judgment.summary: Starbucks shows strong recent earnings growth but faces valuation concerns, negative free cash flow, and high debt.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 14.5%; next earnings date 2026-07-28.
positives: Quarterly earnings growth 33.0% — indicating strong recent performance.
Analyst growth est, current Q 30.2% — positive outlook for the current quarter.
Mean analyst target $106.58 — suggests modest upside potential from current price.
Consensus buy rating from 33 analysts — indicates broad analyst confidence.
negatives: Trailing P/E 79.63 — valuation appears very high.
Forward P/E 34.46 — still a premium valuation.
Profit margin 3.9% — relatively low for a consumer staple.
Free cash flow (TTM) $-1.30B — company is burning cash.

news.paragraph: Starbucks is currently trading at a high valuation, with a trailing P/E of nearly 80 and a forward P/E of 34.46. While recent earnings growth has been strong, the company faces challenges with a negative free cash flow and a high debt-to-equity ratio. The next earnings date is July 28th, which could be a catalyst for price movement.

headlines.title: Why High Earners Feel Broke — And How They Can Feel Rich Again
